title: Void Fog
description: Brings back the void fog of versions prior to Minecraft 1.8 with some slight... improvements
body:
This is an update and port/rewrite of Tamaized's Void Fog for Fabric and Minecraft 1.14 (and beyond).

Just like the original, this mod brings back the void fog of versions prior to Minecraft 1.8, but with some added improvements to make it just that much more fun.

Changes in 1.14
 - Slightly smoothed the fogs encroach/retreat animation
 - The fog will be pushed off when standing in brightly-lit areas (like around torches)
 - Added a secret big boi mode (are you a big boi?)
 - Added an option to configure particle density
